headline: Congress in holiday mode as both chambers hold brief pro forma sessions with major bills still in committee limbo.

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate met briefly in pro forma session on Monday, July 6, adjourning after less than a minute. No legislative business was conducted as the chamber remained in recess mode.

house.lastSessionSummary: The House convened in pro forma session on Monday, July 6 for just two minutes with no votes or debate. Eleven public bills and two resolutions were introduced, including measures on restitution injunctions and Supreme Court composition.

onTheFloor.title: Amend federal law to provide natural lifetime injunctions for certain victims
Propose constitutional amendment requiring Supreme Court be composed of nine justices
